_comment: Environment-related config. Empty values fall through to other layers (CLI flag, env var, then `<env_dir>/state/<default>.db`). Resolution priority for each DB path: CLI flag (--jobs-db / --metrics-db / --feedback-db) > matching env var (NORA_JOBS_DB / NORA_METRICS_DB / NORA_FEEDBACK_DB) > value in this file > computed default under `<env_dir>/state/`.
